---
title: "HDS5101_final_vid"
author: "Klosowski Filip"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

library(mice)
library(Hmisc)
library(VIM)
```


```{r}
marathon_data <- read_csv("marathondata.csv")
dim(marathon_data)
aggr(marathon_data)

missing_prop_long <- marathon_data %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(),
               names_to = "variable",
               values_to = "prop_missing") %>%
  filter(prop_missing > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(prop_missing))

missing_prop_long
```
